School of Business

Apply to join Global College today >

Explore courses at the Global Technical College>

Explore events at the Global Technical College >

Business courses in Kenya at Global Technical College (GTTC) offer more than just classroom learning. They blend academic excellence with practical, real-world training. At the School of Business Administration and Social Sciences, we prepare you with industry-relevant skills to thrive in today’s competitive job market.

Why Choose GTTC School of Business & Social Sciences?

  • Industry-Aligned Curriculum: Tailored to meet the needs of the modern workplace.
  • Hands-On Training: Learn through projects, case studies, and internships.
  • Qualified Faculty: Experienced lecturers and business professionals.
  • Flexible Study Options: Certificate, diploma, and professional short courses.
  • Career Support: Job placement assistance and guidance.

 

Academic Programs

Our business courses in Kenya are designed to equip you with the skills employers demand. We offer Certificate and Diploma programs combining theory with practical application.

Professional Short Courses

Advance your career quickly with our short, targeted courses:

  1. Office Management
  2. Bookkeeping & Accounts
  3. Customer Service Skills
  4. Sales & Marketing Management
  5. Effective Project Management Skills
  6. Report Writing Skills
  7. Leadership Skills
  8. Social Work Fundamentals

 

Career Opportunities

Graduates from our business courses in Kenya work in top organizations and emerging industries.

Popular Career Paths:

  • Human Resource Officer
  • Business Development Executive
  • Community Development Officer
  • Accountant / Finance Officer
  • Project Coordinator
  • ICT Support Technician
  • Media & Communications Officer

Enroll now at Global Technical College to get started.

 

Eastleigh, 2nd Avenue, Section 1 Eastleigh, Nairobi – Kenya

+254799925625 info@globalcollege.ac.ke

Mon – Fri 9:00A.M. – 5:00P.M.

Apply now

How to Apply

Start your journey at Global College in 3 simple steps.

01

Choose Your Program

Explore our courses and select the program that matches your career goals.

02

Submit Your Application

Complete the application form with your personal and academic details.

03

Start Your Learning Journey

Once approved, enroll and begin building the skills for your future career.

At Global Technical College, we believe in the power of practical education to transform lives. Since our founding, we’ve helped thousands of students gain real-world skills.

Ronald
